tournaments.name: FIFA World Cup 2026
tournaments.summary: Global men’s national-team football tournament. Link out to the official event hub for fixtures, tickets, team info and participation pathways.

tournaments.name: ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026
tournaments.summary: International women’s T20 cricket showcase. A strong hook for new fans to find cricket bodies, local clubs and official pathways.

tournaments.name: Aichi-Nagoya Asian Games 2026
tournaments.summary: Major multi-sport event across Asia. Good discovery point for sports people may not normally see on mainstream coverage.

tournaments.name: Men’s Rugby World Cup 2027
tournaments.summary: Australia-hosted international rugby showcase and a natural opportunity to send visitors towards local union, touch, sevens and wheelchair rugby pathways.

tournaments.name: FIBA Basketball World Cup 2027
tournaments.summary: International basketball world cup. Directs fans to official basketball news, rules, pathways and national bodies.

players.name: Football participation pathways
players.feature_reason: World Cup interest often turns into local club enquiries.
players.bio: Use official bodies first: FIFA for global context, then national and local member associations for clubs, coaches, futsal, women’s football, junior football and adapted programs.

career_stats.pathways: club, futsal, school, social, coaching, officiating

accomplishments: Useful for players, volunteers, fans, officials and coaches

players.name: Cricket participation pathways
players.feature_reason: Major cricket events create a good moment to connect new fans with local cricket programs.
players.bio: Use ICC for global competitions and rankings, then national cricket bodies for local clubs, junior formats, women and girls programs, umpiring and volunteering.

career_stats.pathways: club, indoor, social, junior, coaching, umpiring
career_stats.accessibility: ask local bodies about inclusive formats

accomplishments: Useful for players, families, fans, officials and volunteers

players.name: Para sport pathways
players.feature_reason: The site mission is to make sport easier to find whatever someone’s situation.
players.bio: Start with Paralympic and national disability-sport bodies to find classification guidance, sports options, local clubs and pathway information.
accomplishments: Useful for participants with disability, carers, clubs and volunteers

players.name: Cricket in Australia pathways
players.feature_reason: Cricket has clear community entry points for juniors, adults, social players, women and girls, officials, coaches and volunteers.
players.bio: Start with Play Cricket Australia to find local cricket options, then use Cricket Australia for official news, programs and national context.

career_stats.pathways: junior, senior, social, indoor, women and girls, coaching, umpiring, volunteering
career_stats.accessibility: check local club and association options through Play Cricket

accomplishments: Useful for families, beginners, returning players, officials and volunteers

players.name: Motor racing participation pathways
players.feature_reason: Motorsport offers more entry points than driving: club membership, volunteering, officiating, karting, motorcycle sport, esports and junior programs.
players.bio: Use Motorsport Australia, Karting Australia and Motorcycling Australia for official club, licence, beginner and volunteer pathways. Use the FIA for global context and international regulations.

career_stats.pathways: car clubs, karting, motorcycle sport, officials, volunteering, esports, junior programs
career_stats.accessibility: varies by club, discipline, venue and licence category

accomplishments: Useful for drivers, riders, families, mechanics, officials, volunteers and fans

players.name: Sailing and yachting participation pathways
players.feature_reason: Sailing has strong pathways for kids, teens, adults, families, racing, cruising, volunteering, coaching, race management and accessible programs.
players.bio: Use Australian Sailing and Discover Sailing to find clubs, learn-to-sail courses and powerboat programs. Use World Sailing for international events, classes and racing rules.

career_stats.pathways: Tackers, dinghy, keelboat, windsurfing, powerboat, clubs, racing, volunteering, coaching
career_stats.accessibility: Sailability and inclusive club programs may support people with disability

accomplishments: Useful for beginners, sailors, yacht clubs, volunteers, race officials, families and accessible-sport participants

events.name: Official FIBA Basketball World Cup 2027 hub

sport_bodies.name: Australian Sports Directory
sport_bodies.summary: Australian Sports Commission directory for recognised national sporting organisations and disability sporting organisations.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Best first stop for Australians looking for an official national body, disability sport body, club pathway or contact point.

sport_bodies.name: Play Well — Australia’s Sport Participation Strategy
sport_bodies.summary: Participation strategy focused on safe, welcoming, inclusive and enjoyable sporting environments.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful framing for clubs and sports bodies that want to grow participation beyond elite pathways.

sport_bodies.name: Play by the Rules
sport_bodies.summary: Resources for safe, fair and inclusive sport, including inclusion and diversity guidance for clubs and associations.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Helpful for volunteers, administrators and coaches who want practical inclusion tools.

sport_bodies.name: IOC Recognised International Federations
sport_bodies.summary: IOC list of recognised international sports federations that govern sports at world level.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Good global index when someone wants to find the official international body for a sport.

sport_bodies.name: FIFA
sport_bodies.summary: Official global football body and tournament hub.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Use FIFA for global tournament context, then follow national association links for local participation.

sport_bodies.name: International Cricket Council
sport_bodies.summary: Official home for international cricket events, scores, rankings and news.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Use ICC for global cricket context, then national boards for clubs, schools and volunteer pathways.

sport_bodies.name: World Rugby
sport_bodies.summary: Official global rugby union body with tournaments, rankings, education and player welfare resources.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Strong fit for players, coaches, match officials and welfare-focused club volunteers.

sport_bodies.name: FIBA Basketball
sport_bodies.summary: Official FIBA hub for basketball events, rankings, rules and member federation information.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for connecting fans with basketball rules, competitions and national bodies.

sport_bodies.name: World Athletics
sport_bodies.summary: Official global athletics hub for running, jumping, throwing, walking, records and events.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Broad participation appeal because athletics includes school, club, masters, road running and officiating pathways.

sport_bodies.name: World Aquatics
sport_bodies.summary: Official global home for swimming, diving, water polo, artistic swimming, open water and high diving.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for families and participants exploring pool, open-water and aquatic club options.

sport_bodies.name: World Tennis / ITF
sport_bodies.summary: Official international tennis body, including tours, rules, rankings, wheelchair tennis and development resources.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for tennis pathways across juniors, social tennis, wheelchair tennis, officials and coaches.

sport_bodies.name: International Paralympic Committee
sport_bodies.summary: Official Paralympic movement hub for Para sport news, events, classification and results.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Core pathway link for inclusive sport, classification awareness and Para sport discovery.

sport_bodies.name: World Wheelchair Rugby
sport_bodies.summary: Official governing body for wheelchair rugby.
sport_bodies.participation_note: A strong example of a high-energy pathway for athletes with disability and volunteers interested in Para sport.

sport_bodies.name: Cricket Australia
sport_bodies.summary: National body for cricket in Australia, linking fans and participants to official Australian cricket information and pathways.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Use this for official Australian cricket context, then follow Play Cricket to find local clubs, formats and entry points.

sport_bodies.name: Play Cricket Australia
sport_bodies.summary: Cricket Australia participation hub for finding ways to play cricket locally, socially or competitively.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Best first click for families, juniors, adults, social players and people looking for a nearby cricket club.

sport_bodies.name: Motorsport Australia
sport_bodies.summary: Member-based organisation focused on development, regulation and administration of motorsport across Australia.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for finding car clubs, getting started, licensing, officials pathways, women’s participation programs and event information.

sport_bodies.name: Fédération Internationale de l’Automobile (FIA)
sport_bodies.summary: Global governing body for motor sport and a federation for mobility organisations worldwide.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Good international reference for motorsport governance, championships, regulations, safety and global participation initiatives.

sport_bodies.name: Motorcycling Australia
sport_bodies.summary: Australian body for motorcycle sport participation, events, officials, licences, rules and development pathways.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for riders, clubs, families and volunteers looking for motorcycle racing disciplines or official roles.

sport_bodies.name: Karting Australia
sport_bodies.summary: National body recognised to organise, regulate and control karting in Australia.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Great starter pathway for families and juniors interested in motor racing, with club, licence and beginner information.

sport_bodies.name: Australian Power Boat Association
sport_bodies.summary: Australian organisation controlling, governing and administering competition powerboat racing and safety rules.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Relevant for people interested in high-speed water-based motor racing, clubs, events and safety rules.

sport_bodies.name: Australian Sailing
sport_bodies.summary: National body for sailing in Australia, covering grassroots sailing through to high-performance Olympic sailing.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Best official Australian pathway for finding clubs, Discover Sailing Centres, courses, racing, coaching and officiating.

sport_bodies.name: Discover Sailing Australia
sport_bodies.summary: Australian Sailing’s participation hub for learning to sail through programs such as Tackers, Dinghy, OutThere Sailing, Keelboat, Windsurfing and Powerboat.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Best first click for beginners, families, teenagers and adults who want a structured learn-to-sail or powerboat course.

sport_bodies.name: World Sailing
sport_bodies.summary: International federation for sailing and global reference point for rules, events, classes, development and governance.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Useful for international context, racing rules, Olympic sailing pathways and links to member national authorities.

sport_bodies.name: Sailability accessible sailing pathways
sport_bodies.summary: Accessible sailing pathway information for people with disability, including Sailability programs and participating clubs around Australia.
sport_bodies.participation_note: Strong fit for the site mission: sailing can be recreational, social, therapeutic or competitive, with local support through accessible programs.

top_players.name: Ellyse Perry
top_players.summary: Elite Australian all-rounder whose career is useful for showing girls, women and multi-sport athletes what long-term participation can become.
top_players.why_featured: A high-profile Australian cricket role model with broad appeal beyond traditional cricket audiences.
achievements: Strong role model for girls and women in sport
top_players.stats_note: Use official profiles and governing-body records before publishing detailed lifetime statistics.

top_players.name: Pat Cummins
top_players.summary: Australian fast bowler and leader who helps connect fans of elite cricket with junior, club and volunteer pathways.
top_players.why_featured: A recognisable Australian cricket figure for test, one-day and community-cricket crossover content.
achievements: Leadership profile for club and junior programs
top_players.stats_note: Use Cricket Australia, ICC or other official statistics before publishing precise match totals.

top_players.name: Oscar Piastri
top_players.summary: Australian Formula One driver whose pathway is useful for explaining karting, club racing, junior formulas and elite motorsport progression.
top_players.why_featured: A current high-visibility Australian racing figure for motorsport discovery pages.
achievements: Useful bridge to karting and car-club participation
top_players.stats_note: Use Formula 1, FIA or team profiles before publishing season-by-season results.

top_players.name: Molly Taylor
top_players.summary: Australian rally and off-road competitor who is a strong example for women entering motorsport and technical team environments.
top_players.why_featured: Helps show that motorsport involvement is broader than circuit racing and includes rally, off-road, officials and crews.
top_players.stats_note: Use Motorsport Australia, FIA or series records before publishing detailed results.

top_players.name: Tom Slingsby
top_players.summary: Australian sailor whose profile can help introduce club sailing, high-performance sailing, coaching, race management and yachting pathways.
top_players.why_featured: Recognisable elite sailor for connecting spectators with local sailing-club entry points.
achievements: Useful bridge to club and youth sailing
top_players.stats_note: Use Australian Sailing, World Sailing or event records before publishing detailed titles and results.

top_players.name: Matt Wearn
top_players.summary: Australian dinghy sailor whose story works well for showing how local club sailing can feed elite pathways.
top_players.why_featured: A strong Australian example for youth sailing, dinghy racing and Olympic-class pathways.
achievements: Good fit for youth and club sailing discovery
top_players.stats_note: Use Australian Sailing, World Sailing or Olympic records before publishing detailed results.

top_players.name: Sam Kerr
top_players.summary: Australian footballer whose visibility helps introduce juniors, families and social players to football pathways.
top_players.why_featured: High-recognition Australian football role model, especially for girls and women entering sport.
achievements: Good bridge to local football clubs and national team interest
top_players.stats_note: Use Football Australia, club and competition records before publishing detailed goals or caps.

top_players.name: Patty Mills
top_players.summary: Australian basketball player whose profile is useful for connecting Olympic, professional and community basketball audiences.
top_players.why_featured: Recognisable Australian basketball figure for juniors, social basketball and national-team discovery pages.
top_players.stats_note: Use Basketball Australia, league and Olympic records before publishing detailed lifetime totals.
